sentences.base_language: kayla says, "yes, I am very hungry"
sentences.romanized: Kayla shuō: "shì de, wǒ hěn è."

sentences.base_language: Seth asks, "do you want to eat tacos"
sentences.target_language: Seth问："你想吃墨西哥卷饼吗？"
sentences.romanized: Seth wèn: "nǐ xiǎng chī mòxīgē juǎnbǐng ma?"

sentences.base_language: Kayla says, "hmm, i ate tacos yesterday"
sentences.target_language: Kayla说："嗯，我昨天吃了墨西哥卷饼。"
sentences.romanized: Kayla shuō: "ǹg, wǒ zuótiān chī le mòxīgē juǎnbǐng."

sentences.base_language: Seth asks, "do you want to cook spaghetti"
sentences.romanized: Seth wèn: "nǐ xiǎng zuò yìdàlì miàn ma?"

sentences.target_language: Kayla说："好啊，我喜欢意大利面。"
sentences.romanized: Kayla shuō: "hǎo a, wǒ xǐhuān yìdàlì miàn."

sentences.base_language: seth says, "okay, we need to buy ingredients."
sentences.romanized: Seth shuō: "hǎo, wǒmen xūyào mǎi shícái."

sentences.base_language: Seth responds, "We need a tomato, onion, garlic, herbs, and noodles"
sentences.target_language: Seth回答："我们需要番茄、洋葱、大蒜、香草和面条。"
sentences.romanized: Seth huídá: "wǒmen xūyào fānqié, yángcōng, dàsuàn, xiāngcǎo hé miàntiáo."

sentences.base_language: Kayla says, "but the store is closed."
They both look for the ingredients in their house.
sentences.romanized: tāmen liǎ zài jiālǐ zhǎo shícái.

sentences.base_language: Seth finds three tomatoes, one onion, but no noodles.
sentences.target_language: Seth找到了三个番茄、一个洋葱，但没有面条。
sentences.romanized: Seth zhǎodào le sān gè fānqié, yī gè yángcōng, dàn méiyǒu miàntiáo.

sentences.base_language: Seth says, "damnit, we don't have noodles"
Kayla says, "but we have pizza crust.  We can make pizza sauce!"
sentences.target_language: Kayla说："但是我们有披萨饼皮。我们可以做披萨酱！"
sentences.romanized: Kayla shuō: "dànshì wǒmen yǒu pīsà bǐngpí. wǒmen kěyǐ zuò pīsà jiàng!"

sentences.base_language: Seth and Kayla start to cook.
after some time they eat the pizza.
sentences.target_language: 过了一会儿他们吃了披萨。
sentences.romanized: guò le yīhuìr tāmen chī le pīsà.

sentences.base_language: Seth looks at Kayla and says, "this is good but I like tacos better".
sentences.target_language: Seth看着Kayla说："这个好吃，但我更喜欢墨西哥卷饼。"
sentences.romanized: Seth kànzhe Kayla shuō: "zhège hǎochī, dàn wǒ gèng xǐhuān mòxīgē juǎnbǐng."

sentences.base_language: They argue about that then go to bed.
sentences.target_language: 他们为此争论了一番，然后去睡觉了。
sentences.romanized: tāmen wèi cǐ zhēnglùn le yī fān, ránhòu qù shuìjiào le.
